name: ValidateCustomer
businessLogic: Read isCorporateCustomer flag from SlotsDTO; if true, skip all validations and return early.
Read ReferenceContractDTO from SlotsDTO and extract customerResidencyStatus.
If customerResidencyStatus is non-null and non-blank, proceed with residency validation.
Read ReferenceCustomerDTO from SlotsDTO and validate it is not null; throw FbpValidationException with CIF_ID_IS_NULL_OR_INVALID if null.
Check if customer is suspended; throw FbpValidationException with CUSTOMER_IS_SUSPENDED if suspended equals 'SUSPENDED'.
Check if customer periodic review status is rejected; throw FbpValidationException with KYC_STATUS_REJECTED if periodicReviewReviewStatus equals 'REJECTED'.
Insert ReferenceCustomerDTO and ReferenceContractDTO as facts into customerRulesSession and fire rules.
Query the rules engine for customer residency validation output; if result is 'invalidResidentStatus', throw FbpValidationException with INVALID_RESIDENCY_STATUS.
